zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Balliol於1208年之前出生在英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素時，他的父親Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell16歲，母親Cecily de Fontaines28歲。他於1233年與Devorguilla of Galloway在英國達勒姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1264年登記服兵役。他於1261年被列為appointed sheriff of nottinghamshire and derbyshire。他去世於1268年10月25日在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋劍橋大學默里 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Balliol于1208年之前出生在英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素时，他的父亲Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell16岁，母亲Cecily de Fontaines28岁。他于1233年与Devorguilla of Galloway在英国達勒姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1264年登记服兵役。他于1261年被列为appointed sheriff of nottinghamshire and derbyshire。他去世于1268年10月25日在他的家乡，埋葬在英国苏格兰度福利斯 安德 加洛韋劍橋大學默里 艾比。

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Balliol was born before 1208, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, his father, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, was 16 and his mother, Cecily de Fontaines, was 28. He married Devorguilla of Galloway in 1233, in Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. He registered for military service in 1264. In 1261, his occupation is listed as appointed sheriff of nottinghamshire and derbyshire. He died on 25 October 1268, in his hometown, and was buried in New Abbey, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.New Abbey, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotla: New Abbey, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Balliol est né avant 1208, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Fontaines, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Devorguilla of Galloway en 1233, à Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1264. En 1261, sa profession de son indiquée est appointed sheriff of nottinghamshire and derbyshire. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1268, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à New Abbey, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Balliol vor 1208 in Barnard Castle, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell 16 und seine Mutter Cecily de Fontaines 28. Er hat 1233 in Durham, England Devorguilla of Galloway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er hat sich 1264 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1261 ist sein Beruf als appointed sheriff of nottinghamshire and derbyshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1268 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in New Abbey, Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Balliol è nato il prima del 1208 nel Barnard Castle, Durham, England, il suo padre, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Cecily de Fontaines, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Devorguilla of Galloway nel 1233, nel Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1264. Nel 1261, la sua occupazione è indicata come appointed sheriff of nottinghamshire and derbyshire. Morì il 25 ottobre 1268, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a New Abbey, Dumfries and Galloway, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Balliolが1208年以前にイギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルで生まれた時，父Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywellは16歳，母Cecily de Fontainesは28歳であった。1233年にイギリスダルハムでDevorguilla of Gallowayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1264年に兵役登録をした。1261年，職業はappointed sheriff of nottinghamshire and derbyshireと記録されている。彼は1268年10月25日に故郷で死去し，イギリススコットランドダムフリーズ アンド ガロワイニュー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.New Abbey, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotla: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 뉴 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: John de Balliol(이)가 1208년 이전 영국 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily de Fontaines(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1233년 영국 뒤람에서 Devorguilla of Galloway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1261년, 그의 직업은 appointed sheriff of nottinghamshire and derbyshire이었다. 그는 1268년 10월 25일 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 뉴 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Balliol nasceu antes 1208, em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Fontaines, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Devorguilla of Galloway em 1233, em Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1264. Em 1261, sua profissão aparece como appointed sheriff of nottinghamshire and derbyshire. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1268, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em New Abbey, Dumfries and Galloway, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.New Abbey, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotla: ню эбби, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Balliol родился перед 1208 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Fontaines, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Devorguilla of Galloway в 1233 г. в местности дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. В 1264 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1261 годуработал по профессии appointed sheriff of nottinghamshire and derbyshire. Он умер 25 октября 1268 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности ню эбби, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Balliol nació antes de 1208, en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Cecily de Fontaines, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Devorguilla of Galloway en 1233, en Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1264. En 1261, su ocupación registrada era appointed sheriff of nottinghamshire and derbyshire. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1268, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en New Abbey, Dumfries and Galloway, Escocia, Reino Unido.
